economic_notes: Nation involved in economic activity through limited partnership arrangements including Amik Logging Limited Partnership (99.99% ownership) which holds 51% JV interest in Amik Nuna Forestry Services Joint Venture. Nation also holds interests in Shekak Power generating facility (OEFC class D share), Ontario First Nations Sovereign Wealth LP, Landmark Inn Limited Partnership, NE-DAA-KII-ME-NAAN Inc (14.29%), and Matawa Development GP Inc. IESO Shekak Power Corporation revenue of $2,023,964. COVID-19 impacted operations including periodic closures and changes in program delivery.
notes: Fiscal year end March 31 2022. Nation is in Ontario. Two GBEs accounted for by modified equity method: Amik Logging Limited Partnership and 2500845 Ontario Inc. One subsidiary consolidated: Constance Lake Education Authority. Large deferred revenue balance of $13.7M (up from $2.2M prior year) significantly impacted reported surplus - resulted in actual deficit of $492,192 vs budget surplus of $5,578,940. No schedule of remuneration found in extracted text. Funds held in trust - Ottawa ($1,221,314) excluded from Nation reporting entity per policy. Portfolio investments include $9M GIC plus various minority interests carried at nominal values. CMHC mortgages secured by Band Council Resolution and Ministerial Guarantee from ISC.
